## 👋 Welcome to AGUI Framework Discussions!

This is the place to connect with other AGUI Framework users and contributors.

**What you can do here:**

- 💬 **Ask questions** — Get help building agent-powered apps with AGUI Framework
- 💡 **Share ideas** — Propose features, integrations, or improvements
- 🛠 **Show and tell** — Share what you've built with AGUI Framework
- 📖 **Help others** — Answer questions from the community
- 🐛 **Report bugs** — If you find a bug, please open a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/fab679/agui-framework/issues)

**Quick links:**

- 📚 [Documentation](https://fab679.github.io/agui-framework)
- 📦 [npm Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/agui-framework)
- 🔧 [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/fab679/agui-framework)

**Before posting:**
- Check the [documentation](https://fab679.github.io/agui-framework) first
- Use the search to see if your question has already been asked
- Be kind and welcoming — we build this together 💪

Start by introducing yourself below!
